/usr/bin/cc    CMakeFiles/pub.dir/src/pub.c.o CMakeFiles/pub.dir/src/read_co/read_co.c.o CMakeFiles/pub.dir/src/read_volume/read_volume.c.o CMakeFiles/pub.dir/src/write_register/write_register.c.o CMakeFiles/pub.dir/src/read_uci/read_uci.c.o CMakeFiles/pub.dir/src/modbus_init/modbus_init.c.o  -o ../pub  -lmodbus -luci -lubox -lubus -lblobmsg_json -lpthread -lm
